improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant | GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:url" content="https://www.gdn.ai/"><meta property="og:image" content="https://www.gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI for business owners, traders, and professionals. Try three free searches today.">
improvements.rationale: A well-crafted meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating value and a call to action. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure the homepage displays professionally when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. Including the free trial offer and starting price creates urgency and transparency without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace to streamline your operations. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces the product by name and clarifies its purpose, building trust and recognition. The subheading highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the low-friction free trial offer, reducing hesitation and encouraging first engagement.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to join as a member to continue. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own members workspace. Choose annual billing and save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point—the paywall after the free trial. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value, it reduces uncertainty, builds trust, and nudges visitors toward conversion.
